get.description: Get current model info for the authenticated user's workspace.

post.description: Send MQTT command to start labeled IMU recording on device.

schema.title: Response Start Motion Recording Api Motion Record Start Post

post.description: Send MQTT command to stop IMU recording on device.

schema.title: Response Stop Motion Recording Api Motion Record Stop Post

post.description:
Train XGBoost model from motion_training_data in DB.

Pipeline: query DB → group by session → sliding window → extract features → train.

schema.title: Response Train Motion Api Motion Train Post

post.description: Predict action label from a raw IMU data window.

schema.title: Response Predict Motion Action Api Motion Predict Post

get.description: Get current motion model status and metadata.

get.description: Retrieve average vitals for the workspace.

post.description: OAuth2 compatible token login, getting an access token for future requests.

get.description: Get current user information based on the JWT token.

patch.description:
Update the authenticated user's own profile. `profile_image_url` must be an http(s) URL or a
platform-hosted path `/api/public/profile-images/<hex>.jpg`. Data URLs are rejected.
Omitted fields are left unchanged; explicit null clears the image and deletes a hosted file.

post.description: Store a JPEG avatar (e.g. after client-side crop/resize) and set `profile_image_url`.

get.description: Retrieve users. Admins and Supervisors can view users.

schema.title: Response Read Users Api Users Get

post.description: Create a new user. Only Admins can perform this action.

put.description: Update a user. Only Admins can perform this action.

get.description:
List all smart devices linked to this workspace.
In a real scenario with auth, we filter by the current user's workspace_id.

schema.title: Response List Smart Devices Api Ha Devices Get

post.description: Admin only: Add a new smart device mapping from HomeAssistant.

Control a smart device (requires HA API setup).
Observer role cannot control devices.

get.description:
Query the direct status from HomeAssistant.
Anyone can view state.
Return the current retention policy settings.
Return row counts and age ranges for retained tables.

post.description: Trigger an immediate retention cleanup for the active workspace.

schema.title: Response List Photos Api Cameras Photos Get

delete.description: Delete a photo and its disk file.

post.description: Stream assistant text (plain UTF-8 chunks; use with AI SDK `streamProtocol: 'text'`).
